description: Italian American Mafia crime family based in San Francisco, California, organized in the early 1930s by Francesco 'Frank' Lanza. The family was involved in racketeering, gambling, loansharking, extortion, narcotics trafficking, and other illegal activities. Its membership peaked at 15-20 made men under boss James 'Jimmy the Hat' Lanza. The family was active from around 1928 until 2006.
